channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers: Week 14
item.description: There were a handful of upsets during the college football weekend. But no one will be talking about that as flag fights marred the interesting slate of matchups.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: VanVleet has season-high 38 to lead Rockets to 119-116 win over Thunder
item.description: Fred VanVleet had a season-high 38 points and Dillon Brooks made a go-ahead jump shot late to help the Houston Rockets to a 119-116 win over the Oklahoma City Thunder Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Megan Rapinoe hypes NWSL star's award win despite sex eligibility test controversy
item.description: Former U.S. women's soccer star Megan Rapinoe defended Barbra Banda after the African soccer player was named the BBC's Women's Footballer of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Syracuse knocks No. 6 Miami out of ACC title game and possibly the playoff with 42-38 win
item.description: SYRACUSE, N.Y. (AP) — Kyle McCord and Syracuse knocked No. 6 Miami out of Atlantic Coast Conference title contention — and possibly ended the Hurricanes' College Football Playoff hopes — by rallying from a 21-0 deficit for a 42-38 win on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK FRANK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sellers' 20-yard TD run with 1:08 to go lifts No. 16 South Carolina to 17-14 win over No. 12 Clemson
item.description: CLEMSON, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina coach Shane Beamer has no doubt about where his surging, 16th-ranked Gamecocks belong in the postseason — chasing a national championship.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 4 Penn State overcomes slow start to beat Maryland 44-7 and advance to Big Ten title game
item.description: STATE COLLEGE, Pa. (AP) — Drew Allar threw for a touchdown and ran for another score as No. 4 Penn State beat Maryland 44-7 Saturday and advanced to its first Big Ten championship game since 2016.
item.dc:creator: TRAVIS JOHNSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies blow 17-point fourth quarter lead in loss to CSU
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State football team could not hold a 30-13 fourth quarter lead in its season finale at Colorado State, and the Aggies end the season with a 42-37 loss to the Rams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado Buffaloes finishes season with a win over Oklahoma State 52-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado head coach Deion Sanders confidently told the media before the game that his team wasn’t just aiming to win but to dominate. Travis Hunter wasted no time backing up that claim.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Former Tennessee head coach Bill Battle dies at 82
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (WATE) -- Former University of Tennessee Coach William "Bill" Battle III died on Thanksgiving morning at the age of 82, according to the university.
item.dc:creator: Hope McAlee, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Oakland youth football team raises funds for national championship trip
item.description: (KRON) -- One of the Bay Area's top youth football programs has qualified for the 2024 Pop Warner Championship. However, the East Bay Warriors 13U team will need the community's support to help get them there.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Chicago looks to break Boston's 6-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (15-3, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (8-12, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago hosts Dallas in Central Division play
item.description: Dallas Stars (13-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (7-12-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Wednesday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Dallas Stars visit the Chicago Blackhawks in a matchup within the Central Division Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres launch holiday ticket sale for 2025 season, but not for long
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) -- For a limited time only, San Diego Padres fans can score single-game tickets for the 2025 season. On Thursday, the team launched its holiday sale, which will last until midnight on Friday, Dec. 6.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: SEC fines University of Oklahoma $200,000 after fans rush onto field
item.description: The University of Oklahoma was fined $200,000 after the fans rushed the field during Saturday's game against Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Dylan Brown / KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Hagel ties NHL record with 4 assists in 1st period, Lightning beat Avalanche 8-2
item.description: Brandon Hagel tied an NHL record with four assists in the opening period and finished with five as the Tampa Bay Lightning cruised past the Colorado Avalanche 8-2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at dominating win over the Giants
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned from their bye week in dominating fashion with a 30-7 win over the New York Giants that ended a four-game losing streak and helped their playoff hopes in the process.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family has boiled over.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation
